project_goals: Build India's most accurate multilingual AI Voice Moderation Platform.
Ensure explainability over black box AI (Determinism before LLM).
completed_features: Basic violation detection service (bad words, phone regex, threat)
pending_features: Indian Number Intelligence module (spoken OTP/phone detection)
architecture_decisions: 6-Layer Intelligence Pipeline (Audio, Speech, Language, Compliance, Reasoning, Business).
Layer 4 (Compliance) detects deterministically. Layer 5 (Reasoning/LLM) only explains.
No vendor lock-in: Whisper and Pyannote run locally.
Business rules are configuration, not code.
known_bugs: ISSUE-003: Email Alerts Disabled Without SMTP Credentials
ISSUE-004: torchcodec DLL Warnings on Windows
important_notes: Audio is never persisted. Always deleted in finally block (P-03).
Commit style: feat(scope): description (small atomic commits).
Frontend uses localhost:8001 hardcoded in AgentMonitor.
